Date: 15 October 2023

Mobile: +65 9123 4567  

Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Data Scientist at Innovate Solutions Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T1234567A) under the following terms and conditions:

1. Your monthly salary will be SGD 12,500, payable on the last working day of each month.
2. You will report directly to Mr. Alan Lee, Head of Data Science.
3. This offer is contingent upon the verification of your credentials and references.
4. Please note that this offer does not constitute a project plan for any specific undertaking.
5. The commencement date will be mutually agreed upon, pending the completion of all necessary onboarding procedures.
6. Upon acceptance, you will be required to sign the Service Provider Agreement (the "SPA"), which outlines additional terms.
7. Your NRIC, for employment purposes, is recorded as S2345678C, and should be referenced in communications as follows: https://company.sg/verify/S2345678C.
8. For any inquiries, feel free to contact our HR department at hr@innovatesolutions.sg.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing below and returning a copy to us by 22 October 2023.

Sincerely,

Mrs. Emily Koh  
Human Resources Manager  
Innovate Solutions Pte. Ltd.  
+65 6789 4321  

[Signature Line]  

[End of Document]
